title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 7.
content:
There was an Old Person of Chili,
    Whose conduct was painful and silly;
    He sate on the stairs,
    Eating apples and pears,
    That imprudent Old Person of Chili.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 7." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
